mapper.sql: id, user_id, qualification_name, issuing_authority, cert_no, obtain_date, expire_date, cert_image, verify_status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from public.biz_counselor_qualification where id = #{id} and deleted = '0'
select from public.biz_counselor_qualification where user_id = #{userId} and deleted = '0' order by create_time desc
select from public.biz_counselor_qualification where cert_no = #{certNo} and deleted = '0'
select from public.biz_counselor_qualification where verify_status = #{verifyStatus} and deleted = '0' order by create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into public.biz_counselor_qualification
id, user_id, qualification_name, issuing_authority, cert_no, obtain_date, expire_date, cert_image, verify_status, create_time, update_time, deleted,
#{id}, #{userId}, #{qualificationName}, #{issuingAuthority}, #{certNo}, #{obtainDate}, #{expireDate}, #{certImage}, #{verifyStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted},
mapper.update:
update public.biz_counselor_qualification
user_id = #{userId}, qualification_name = #{qualificationName}, issuing_authority = #{issuingAuthority}, cert_no = #{certNo}, obtain_date = #{obtainDate}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, cert_image = #{certImage}, verify_status = #{verifyStatus}, update_time = current_timestamp
where id = #{id} and deleted = '0'
